critique.summary: The AST includes all interactive elements (Username, Password, Log in, Lost password? link, Access as a guest, Cookies notice) and the described submission success/failure behaviors; no critical issues found.
The AST includes all interactive elements described (time range, sort, search, course filter, new event button, month navigation, and the two links); no critical missing items or phantoms were found.

The AST includes all expected interactive elements (Edit mode toggle, Reset and +Add actions with Edit-mode visibility, Add a block page with listed block types and Cancel link, repeating blocks with move handle and options menu including configure/move/delete) and correctly models the Edit-mode conditionals and persistence consequences.

The AST includes all interactive controls and actions described (status dropdown with correct options, search, sort, layout dropdown with options, course name link with navigation, and per-card menu actions), with no structural errors or missing critical elements.
AST correctly captures the interactive elements described (tabs, collapse-all link, per-section toggle, and activity links) with no critical omissions or structural errors.

modules.module_title: Course Edit Mode and Activity Chooser

critique.summary: The AST includes all interactive elements and conditionals described (edit/rename controls, section and activity action menus, selection checkboxes, bulk actions bar, add buttons, activity chooser modal with category filter, search, tiles, favorites, and Add/Cancel behavior) and has no structural errors or unsupported phantoms.
The AST includes all expected interactive elements, panels, conditional visibility rules, submit actions, and inline validation described for the Assignment Creation form.

The AST includes all expected interactive fields, conditionals (end-date toggle and layout visibility), panels, and submit actions with matching preconditions and inline validations described in the spec.

The AST includes all interactive elements described (filters, alpha buttons, participants table with row actions and bulk actions, and the enrol dialog); only a single universally implied Cancel action was added.

phantoms.reason: A Cancel/close action on the dialog is not explicitly mentioned in the description but is a universally implied modal control.

critique.summary: The AST correctly models the interactive elements described (Grade action and the tab navigation); no critical or minor interactive elements are missing and there are no phantoms or structural errors.
AST is usable and matches the description; one minor omission: the Final_Grade inline field has no specific input type.

missing.reason: The description specifies inline grade entry when Quick grading is enabled, so the Final_Grade inline field should have a concrete input type (e.g., number or grade_input); the AST has 'unspecified'.

critique.summary: The AST includes all expected interactive elements (report selector, user search, group filter, per-column and per-cell menus, edit-mode control, inline editable cells, and save action) and models the described conditionals and constraints.

The AST includes all interactive elements named in the description (Message button, Edit profile link, Data retention summary, course profile links, miscellaneous/report links); passive display items (name, initials, email, visibility, timezone, login timestamps) are correctly omitted.
The AST accurately captures all interactive elements, required fields, collapsible sections, upload behavior, tag input, submit actions, and preconditions described; no critical items missing.

AST correctly represents the single interactive Log out action in the top navigation user menu with appropriate precondition and on_success behavior; no missing or phantom interactive elements detected.
